name: nextjs
description: Next.js framework power pack — routing, hydration, server/client boundary analysis
rules: Validate App Router vs Pages Router patterns
Check server/client component boundaries ('use client' / 'use server')
Check for proper data fetching patterns (Server Components, Route Handlers)
Analyze dynamic vs static rendering decisions
Check for proper error boundary placement

checks.description: Validate 'use client' directive placement and necessity
Validate 'use server' directive placement for Server Actions
Detect potential hydration mismatch patterns (window/document usage in SSR)
Check for proper metadata exports in route segments
